_readme: Owner-editable config for scripts/deployment_ladder.py. fomc_dates and earnings_dates start EMPTY on purpose -- this app never backfills calendar facts from model memory (MASTER_AGENT_PROMPT.md discipline: dated facts come from the owner or a verifiable source, not invented). Until filled in, the tranche-1 participation gate and the blackout guardrail both fail soft to a labeled warning instead of silently assuming every day is clear. hy_oas_blowout_level/hy_oas_blowout_21d_jump are fixed reference thresholds (FRED BAMLH0A0HYM2 is quoted in percentage points), not fitted -- same spirit as positioning_adapters.py's STRETCHED_THRESHOLD.
